# DATPAQ Validate IP API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ Validate IP API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/validate-ip
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/validate-ip/validate
- OpenAPI schema: /openapi.json
- OpenAI-oriented machine doc: /openai.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Single IP validation for IPv4, IPv6, and CIDR input.
- Batch validation using JSON arrays of addresses or CIDR strings.
- Request validation for required values, including the `x-api-key` header.
- Loading, error, empty, and success states with copyable request and response artifacts.

## Request contract
- Method: `POST`
- Path: `/v1/validate-ip/validate`
- Header: `x-api-key`
- Body: `{ "ip": "8.8.8.8" }` or `{ "ip": ["8.8.8.8", "10.0.0.0/8"] }`

## Response contract
- Success may return a single validation object or an array of validation objects.
- Common fields include `ip`, `valid`, `type`, `cidr`, `private`, `reserved`, `loopback`, `multicast`, `link_local`, `bogon`, and `message`.
- Invalid entries may include `error` instead of classification flags.
